custom-sql.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OSB_TicketEntry INNER JOIN OSB_TicketWorker ON OSB_TicketWorker.ticketEntryId = OSB_TicketEntry.ticketEntryId WHERE (OSB_TicketWorker.userId = OSB_SupportWorker.userId) AND (OSB_TicketWorker.primary_ = [$TRUE$]) AND (OSB_TicketEntry.closedDate IS NULL) AND (OSB_TicketEntry.status != [$STATUS_INACTIVE$]) AND (OSB_TicketEntry.weight = [$WEIGHT$])
UPDATE OSB_SupportTeam SET OSB_SupportTeam.assignedWork = ( SELECT SUM(OSB_SupportWorker.assignedWork) FROM OSB_SupportWorker WHERE OSB_SupportWorker.supportTeamId = OSB_SupportTeam.supportTeamId )
UPDATE OSB_SupportTeam SET OSB_SupportTeam.maxWork = ( SELECT SUM(OSB_SupportWorker.maxWork) FROM OSB_SupportWorker WHERE OSB_SupportWorker.supportTeamId = OSB_SupportTeam.supportTeamId )

SELECT DISTINCT OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId FROM OSB_AccountEntry LEFT JOIN OSB_PartnerEntry ON OSB_PartnerEntry.partnerEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.partnerEntryId LEFT JOIN Address ON (Address.companyId = ?) AND (Address.classNameId = [$CLASS_NAME_ID_COM.LIFERAY.OSB.MODEL.ACCOUNTENTRY$]) AND (Address.classPK = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( (OSB_AccountEntry.redirectAccountEntryId = 0) AND ( (OSB_AccountEntry.userId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.createDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.createDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.modifiedUserId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.modifiedDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.modifiedDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.industry = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerManagedSupport = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.tier = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.status = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.instructions) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.notes) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_PartnerEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(Address.street1) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (Address.countryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (Address.regionId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(Address.city) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(Address.zip) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) )
WHERE (OSB_AccountEntry.industry = ?)
WHERE (OSB_AccountEntry.status = ?)
WHERE (OSB_AccountEntry.tier = ?)
WHERE (OSB_AccountEntry.type_ = ?)

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_AccountEntry.*} FROM OSB_AccountEntry INNER JOIN OSB_SecurityPatch ON (OSB_SecurityPatch.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] (OSB_SecurityPatch.portletId = ?) ORDER BY OSB_AccountEntry.name

SELECT DISTINCT OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId, OSB_AccountEntry.name AS accountEntryName, OSB_AccountEntry.code_ AS accountEntryCode FROM OSB_AccountEntry LEFT JOIN OSB_PartnerEntry ON OSB_PartnerEntry.partnerEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.partnerEntryId LEFT JOIN Address ON (Address.companyId = ?) AND (Address.classNameId = [$CLASS_NAME_ID_COM.LIFERAY.OSB.MODEL.ACCOUNTENTRY$]) AND (Address.classPK = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( (OSB_AccountEntry.redirectAccountEntryId = 0) AND ( (OSB_AccountEntry.userId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.createDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.createDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.modifiedUserId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.modifiedDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.modifiedDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.industry = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerManagedSupport = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.tier = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.status = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.instructions) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.notes) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_PartnerEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(Address.street1) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (Address.countryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (Address.regionId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(Address.city) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(Address.zip) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) )
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountCustomer ON (OSB_AccountCustomer.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) WHERE (OSB_AccountCustomer.userId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountEnvironment ON (OSB_AccountEnvironment.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId)
WHERE (OSB_AccountEnvironment.envAS = ?)
WHERE (OSB_AccountEnvironment.envDB = ?)
WHERE (OSB_AccountEnvironment.envJVM = ?)
WHERE (OSB_AccountEnvironment.envLFR = ?)
WHERE (OSB_AccountEnvironment.envOS = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountWorker ON (OSB_AccountWorker.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) WHERE ( (OSB_AccountWorker.userId = ?) AND (OSB_AccountWorker.role = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )

INNER JOIN OSB_OfferingEntry ON (OSB_OfferingEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) WHERE ( (OSB_AccountEntry.type_ = 4) AND (OSB_OfferingEntry.licenses = [$TRUE$]) AND (OSB_OfferingEntry.status = ?) )

WHERE (OSB_AccountEntry.type_ != 4) AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OSB_OfferingEntry WHERE ( (OSB_OfferingEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) AND (OSB_OfferingEntry.status = ?) ) ) [$ACTIVE_SUPPORT_COMPARATOR$] 0

WHERE (OSB_AccountEntry.type_ != 4) AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OSB_OfferingEntry WHERE ( (OSB_OfferingEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) AND (OSB_OfferingEntry.supportEndDate > ?) ) ) [$EXPIRED_SUPPORT_COMPARATOR$] 0
LEFT JOIN OSB_OfferingEntry (OSB_OfferingEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) WHERE (OSB_OfferingEntry.accountEntryId IS NULL)
INNER JOIN OSB_OfferingEntry ON (OSB_OfferingEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId)
INNER JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker ON (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerManagedSupport = [$TRUE$]) AND (OSB_PartnerWorker.partnerEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.partnerEntryId) WHERE (OSB_PartnerWorker.userId = ?)
WHERE (OSB_OfferingEntry.productEntryId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountEntries_SupportRegions ON (OSB_AccountEntries_SupportRegions.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) WHERE (OSB_AccountEntries_SupportRegions.supportRegionId = ?)
WHERE (OSB_OfferingEntry.supportResponseId = ?)

WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OSB_OfferingEntry WHERE (OSB_OfferingEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) AND (OSB_OfferingEntry.supportTickets = [$TRUE$]) AND (OSB_OfferingEntry.status = ?) ) [$TICKET_SUPPORT_COMPARATOR$] 0

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_HolidayEntry.*} FROM OSB_HolidayEntry INNER JOIN OSB_HolidayCalendar ON (OSB_HolidayCalendar.holidayCalendarId = OSB_HolidayEntry.holidayCalendarId) INNER JOIN OSB_HolidayCalendarRel ON (OSB_HolidayCalendarRel.holidayCalendarId = OSB_HolidayCalendar.holidayCalendarId) WHERE (OSB_HolidayCalendarRel.userId = ?) AND (OSB_HolidayEntry.repeatYearly = ?)

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_HolidayEntry.*} FROM OSB_HolidayEntry INNER JOIN OSB_HolidayCalendar ON (OSB_HolidayCalendar.holidayCalendarId = OSB_HolidayEntry.holidayCalendarId) INNER JOIN OSB_HolidayCalendarRel ON (OSB_HolidayCalendarRel.holidayCalendarId = OSB_HolidayCalendar.holidayCalendarId) WHERE (OSB_HolidayCalendarRel.userId = ?) AND (OSB_HolidayEntry.repeatYearly = ?) AND ( ( (OSB_HolidayEntry.startDate >= ?) AND (OSB_HolidayEntry.startDate <= ?) ) OR ( (OSB_HolidayEntry.endDate >= ?) AND (OSB_HolidayEntry.endDate <= ?) ) )

SELECT DISTINCT OSB_LicenseKey.licenseKeyId FROM OSB_LicenseKey LEFT JOIN OSB_AccountEntry ON OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_LicenseKey.accountEntryId LEFT JOIN OSB_LicenseKeySet ON OSB_LicenseKeySet.licenseKeySetId = OSB_LicenseKey.licenseKeySetId [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( (OSB_LicenseKey.userId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.createDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.createDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.modifiedUserId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.modifiedDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.modifiedDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] ( (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) OR (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKeySet.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.startDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.startDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.licenseEntryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.productEntryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.productEntryName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.productId) = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.productVersion = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.owner) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.description) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.hostName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.ipAddresses) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.macAddresses) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.serverId) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.key_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.expirationDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.expirationDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )

SELECT DISTINCT OSB_LicenseKey.licenseKeyId, OSB_LicenseKey.startDate, OSB_LicenseKey.expirationDate FROM OSB_LicenseKey LEFT JOIN OSB_AccountEntry ON OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_LicenseKey.accountEntryId LEFT JOIN OSB_LicenseKeySet ON OSB_LicenseKeySet.licenseKeySetId = OSB_LicenseKey.licenseKeySetId [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( (OSB_LicenseKey.userId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.createDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.createDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.modifiedUserId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.modifiedDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.modifiedDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] ( (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) OR (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKeySet.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.startDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.startDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.licenseEntryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.productEntryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.productEntryName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.productId) = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.productVersion = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.owner) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.description) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.hostName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.ipAddresses) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.macAddresses) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.serverId) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.key_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.expirationDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.expirationDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )

INNER JOIN OSB_AccountCustomer ON (OSB_AccountCustomer.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) WHERE ( (OSB_AccountCustomer.userId = ?) AND (OSB_AccountEntry.type_ = 2) AND (OSB_LicenseKey.userId = ?) )

INNER JOIN OSB_AccountWorker ON (OSB_AccountWorker.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) WHERE ( (OSB_AccountWorker.userId = ?) AND (OSB_AccountEntry.type_ = 2) AND (OSB_LicenseKey.userId = ?) )
WHERE (OSB_LicenseKey.active_ = ?)
WHERE (OSB_AccountEntry.type_ = ?)
WHERE (OSB_LicenseKey.assetReceiptLicenseId >= ?)
WHERE (OSB_LicenseKey.orderEntryId >= ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker ON (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerManagedSupport = [$TRUE$]) AND (OSB_PartnerWorker.partnerEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.partnerEntryId) WHERE (OSB_PartnerWorker.userId = ?)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_OfferingEntry [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] (OSB_OfferingEntry.userId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OfferingEntry.accountEntryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OfferingEntry.productEntryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OfferingEntry.type_ = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OfferingEntry.status = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OfferingEntry.supportEndDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OfferingEntry.supportEndDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$])
WHERE (OSB_OfferingEntry.version = ?)

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_OfferingEntry.*} FROM OSB_OfferingEntry [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] (OSB_OfferingEntry.userId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OfferingEntry.accountEntryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OfferingEntry.productEntryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OfferingEntry.type_ = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OfferingEntry.status = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OfferingEntry.supportEndDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OfferingEntry.supportEndDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ORDER BY OSB_OfferingEntry.createDate DESC
WHERE (OSB_OfferingEntry.licenseLifetime = ?)

INNER JOIN User_ ON (OSB_OfferingEntry.userId = User_.userId) WHERE ( (lower(User_.firstName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(User_.middleName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(User_.lastName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(User_.screenName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(User_.emailAddress) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )
WHERE (OSB_OfferingEntry.licenses = [$TRUE$]) AND ( (OSB_OfferingEntry.productEntryId = ?) OR (? = 0) )
WHERE (OSB_OfferingEntry.supportTickets = [$TRUE$])

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT OSB_OrderEntry.orderEntryId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_OrderEntry [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( (OSB_OrderEntry.userId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.createDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.createDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.modifiedUserId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.modifiedDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.modifiedDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.accountEntryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_OrderEntry.purchaseOrderKey) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.status = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.startDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.startDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.prorated = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.actualStartDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.actualStartDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_OrderEntry.*} FROM OSB_OrderEntry [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( (OSB_OrderEntry.userId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.createDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.createDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.modifiedUserId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.modifiedDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.modifiedDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.accountEntryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_OrderEntry.purchaseOrderKey) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.status = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.startDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.startDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.prorated = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.actualStartDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_OrderEntry.actualStartDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )
INNER JOIN OSB_OfferingEntry ON (OSB_OfferingEntry.orderEntryId = OSB_OrderEntry.orderEntryId) WHERE (OSB_OfferingEntry.productEntryId = ?)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT OSB_PartnerEntry.partnerEntryId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_PartnerEntry [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] (lower(OSB_PartnerEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_PartnerEntry.status = ?)
WHERE (OSB_PartnerEntry.status = ?)

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_PartnerEntry.*} FROM OSB_PartnerEntry [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] (lower(OSB_PartnerEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_PartnerEntry.status = ?) ORDER BY OSB_PartnerEntry.code_
WHERE OSB_PartnerEntry.partnerEntryId [$NOT_IN_OR_IN_CHECK$] ( SELECT DISTINCT OSB_PartnerEntry.parentPartnerEntryId FROM OSB_PartnerEntry WHERE (OSB_PartnerEntry.parentPartnerEntryId > 0) )
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountEntry ON (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerEntryId = OSB_PartnerEntry.partnerEntryId) WHERE (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerManagedSupport = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker ON (OSB_PartnerWorker.partnerEntryId = OSB_PartnerEntry.partnerEntryId) WHERE (OSB_PartnerWorker.userId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_PartnerEntries_SupportRegions ON (OSB_PartnerEntries_SupportRegions.partnerEntryId = OSB_PartnerEntry.partnerEntryId) WHERE (OSB_PartnerEntries_SupportRegions.supportRegionId = ?)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_ProductEntry [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] (OSB_ProductEntry.name = ? OR ? IS NULL)
INNER JOIN OSB_OfferingEntry ON (OSB_OfferingEntry.productEntryId = OSB_ProductEntry.productEntryId) WHERE (OSB_OfferingEntry.accountEntryId = ?) AND (OSB_OfferingEntry.licenses = [$TRUE$])

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_ProductEntry.*} FROM OSB_ProductEntry INNER JOIN OSB_OfferingEntry ON (OSB_OfferingEntry.productEntryId = OSB_ProductEntry.productEntryId) WHERE (OSB_OfferingEntry.accountEntryId = ?) AND (OSB_OfferingEntry.status = 1) ORDER BY OSB_ProductEntry.name
SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_ProductEntry.*} FROM OSB_ProductEntry [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] (OSB_ProductEntry.name = ? OR ? IS NULL) ORDER BY OSB_ProductEntry.name

SELECT {OSB_SupportResponse.*} FROM OSB_SupportResponse INNER JOIN OSB_OfferingEntry ON (OSB_OfferingEntry.supportResponseId = OSB_SupportResponse.supportResponseId) WHERE (OSB_OfferingEntry.accountEntryId = ?) AND (OSB_OfferingEntry.status = 1) ORDER BY OSB_SupportResponse.supportLevel DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_SupportTeam WHERE (lower(OSB_SupportTeam.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_SupportTeam.type_ = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$])
SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_SupportTeam.*} FROM OSB_SupportTeam WHERE (lower(OSB_SupportTeam.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_SupportTeam.type_ = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$])

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_SupportTeam.*} FROM OSB_SupportTeam INNER JOIN OSB_SupportWorker ON (OSB_SupportWorker.supportTeamId = OSB_SupportTeam.supportTeamId) WHERE (OSB_SupportWorker.userId = ?) AND (OSB_SupportWorker.role = ? OR ? = 0)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_SupportWorker [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] (OSB_SupportWorker.assignedWork [$UTILIZATION_COMPARATOR$] OSB_SupportWorker.maxWork) AND ( (OSB_SupportWorker.escalationLevel = ?) OR (? = 0) )

SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_SupportWorker INNER JOIN User_ ON User_.userId = OSB_SupportWorker.userId INNER JOIN OSB_SupportTeam ON OSB_SupportTeam.supportTeamId = OSB_SupportWorker.supportTeamId WHERE ((OSB_SupportWorker.supportLaborId = ?) OR (? = 0)) AND ( (lower(User_.emailAddress) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(User_.firstName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(User_.middleName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(User_.lastName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(User_.screenName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_SupportTeam.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_SupportWorker.*} FROM OSB_SupportWorker INNER JOIN User_ ON (User_.userId = OSB_SupportWorker.userId) WHERE (OSB_SupportWorker.supportTeamId = ?) ORDER BY User_.lastName ASC, User_.firstName ASC

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_SupportWorker.*} FROM OSB_SupportWorker [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] (OSB_SupportWorker.assignedWork [$UTILIZATION_COMPARATOR$] OSB_SupportWorker.maxWork) AND ( (OSB_SupportWorker.escalationLevel = ?) OR (? = 0) ) ORDER BY (OSB_SupportWorker.assignedWork / OSB_SupportWorker.maxWork) ASC, OSB_SupportWorker.maxWork DESC, OSB_SupportWorker.assignedWork ASC

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_SupportWorker.*} FROM OSB_SupportWorker INNER JOIN OSB_SupportTeam ON (OSB_SupportTeam.supportTeamId = OSB_SupportWorker.supportTeamId) INNER JOIN OSB_SupportTeams_SupportRegions ON (OSB_SupportTeams_SupportRegions.supportTeamId = OSB_SupportTeam.supportTeamId) WHERE [$WHERE$] (OSB_SupportWorker.role [$ROLE_COMPARATOR$] ?) AND (OSB_SupportWorker.autoAssign = [$TRUE$]) AND (OSB_SupportTeam.type_ = ?) AND ((OSB_SupportTeams_SupportRegions.supportRegionId = ?) OR (? = 0)) ORDER BY (OSB_SupportWorker.assignedWork / OSB_SupportWorker.maxWork) ASC, OSB_SupportWorker.maxWork DESC, OSB_SupportWorker.assignedWork ASC

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_SupportWorker.*} FROM OSB_SupportWorker INNER JOIN User_ ON (User_.userId = OSB_SupportWorker.userId) INNER JOIN OSB_SupportTeam ON (OSB_SupportTeam.supportTeamId = OSB_SupportWorker.supportTeamId) WHERE ((OSB_SupportWorker.supportLaborId = ?) OR (? = 0)) AND ( (lower(User_.emailAddress) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(User_.firstName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(User_.middleName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(User_.lastName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(User_.screenName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_SupportTeam.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )
INNER JOIN OSB_SupportWorkerAccountTier ON (OSB_SupportWorkerAccountTier.supportWorkerId = OSB_SupportWorker.supportWorkerId) WHERE (OSB_SupportWorkerAccountTier.accountTier = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_SupportWorkerComponent ON (OSB_SupportWorkerComponent.supportWorkerId = OSB_SupportWorker.supportWorkerId) WHERE (OSB_SupportWorkerComponent.component = ?)
WHERE (OSB_SupportTeam.locationSupportRegionId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_SupportWorkerSeverity ON (OSB_SupportWorkerSeverity.supportWorkerId = OSB_SupportWorker.supportWorkerId) WHERE (OSB_SupportWorkerSeverity.severity = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_SupportTeams_SupportRegions ON (OSB_SupportTeams_SupportRegions.supportTeamId = OSB_SupportWorker.supportTeamId) WHERE (OSB_SupportTeams_SupportRegions.supportRegionId = ?)
WHERE (OSB_SupportWorker.supportTeamId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountEntries_SupportTeams ON (OSB_AccountEntries_SupportTeams.supportTeamId = OSB_SupportWorker.supportTeamId) WHERE (OSB_AccountEntries_SupportTeams.accountEntryId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_SupportTeamLanguage ON (OSB_SupportTeamLanguage.supportTeamId = OSB_SupportWorker.supportTeamId) WHERE ( (OSB_SupportTeamLanguage.languageId = ?) OR (? = 0) )
INNER JOIN OSB_SupportTeam ON (OSB_SupportTeam.supportTeamId = OSB_SupportWorker.supportTeamId) WHERE (OSB_SupportTeam.type_ = ?)
WHERE (OSB_SupportWorker.userId = ?)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_TicketComment INNER JOIN Users_Orgs ON (OSB_TicketComment.userId = Users_Orgs.userId) WHERE (OSB_TicketComment.ticketEntryId = ?) AND (OSB_TicketComment.visibility = ?) AND (OSB_TicketComment.status = ?) AND (Users_Orgs.organizationId = ?)

SELECT DISTINCT OSB_TicketEntry.ticketEntryId FROM OSB_TicketEntry INNER JOIN OSB_AccountEntry ON (OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_TicketEntry.accountEntryId) [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( ( (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) OR (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.tier = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.userId = ? OR ? = 0) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.closedDate [$SATISFIED_DUE_DATE_COMPARATOR$] OSB_TicketEntry.dueDate) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.createDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.createDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] ( [$TICKET_COMMENT$] (lower(OSB_TicketEntry.subject) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) OR (lower(OSB_TicketEntry.description) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] [$TICKET_STATUS$] (OSB_TicketEntry.severity = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.weight = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.escalationLevel = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.envOS = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.envDB = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.envJVM = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.envAS = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.envLFR = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.component = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.resolution = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.closedDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.closedDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.dueDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.dueDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.customerModifiedDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.customerModifiedDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.workerModifiedDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.workerModifiedDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )
WHERE (OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId = ?)
SELECT DISTINCT OSB_TicketComment.ticketEntryId FROM OSB_TicketComment WHERE [$COMMENT_VISIBILITY$] (OSB_TicketComment.status = 0) AND (lower(OSB_TicketComment.body) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$])

SELECT DISTINCT OSB_TicketEntry.ticketEntryId, OSB_TicketEntry.createDate, OSB_TicketEntry.ticketId, OSB_TicketEntry.status, OSB_TicketEntry.resolution, OSB_TicketEntry.dueDate, OSB_AccountEntry.code_ FROM OSB_TicketEntry INNER JOIN OSB_AccountEntry ON (OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_TicketEntry.accountEntryId) [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( ( (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) OR (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.tier = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.userId = ? OR ? = 0) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.closedDate [$SATISFIED_DUE_DATE_COMPARATOR$] OSB_TicketEntry.dueDate) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.createDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.createDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] ( [$TICKET_COMMENT$] (lower(OSB_TicketEntry.subject) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) OR (lower(OSB_TicketEntry.description) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] [$TICKET_STATUS$] (OSB_TicketEntry.severity = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.weight = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.escalationLevel = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.envOS = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.envDB = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.envJVM = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.envAS = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.envLFR = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.component = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.resolution = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.closedDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.closedDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.dueDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.dueDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.customerModifiedDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.customerModifiedDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.workerModifiedDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketEntry.workerModifiedDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountCustomer ON (OSB_AccountCustomer.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) WHERE (OSB_AccountCustomer.userId = ?)
WHERE (OSB_TicketComment.visibility = 1)
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountWorker ON (OSB_AccountWorker.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) WHERE ( (OSB_AccountWorker.userId = ?) AND (OSB_AccountWorker.role = ?) )

INNER JOIN OSB_TicketWorker ON (OSB_TicketWorker.ticketEntryId = OSB_TicketEntry.ticketEntryId) INNER JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker ON ( (OSB_PartnerWorker.userId = OSB_TicketWorker.userId) OR (OSB_PartnerWorker.userId = OSB_TicketEntry.userId) ) WHERE (OSB_PartnerWorker.partnerEntryId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker ON (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerManagedSupport = [$TRUE$]) AND (OSB_PartnerWorker.partnerEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.partnerEntryId) WHERE (OSB_PartnerWorker.userId = ?)
WHERE ( (OSB_TicketComment.visibility = 1) OR ( (OSB_TicketComment.visibility = 2) AND (OSB_PartnerWorker.userId = ?) ) )
INNER JOIN OSB_TicketFlag ON (OSB_TicketFlag.ticketEntryId = OSB_TicketEntry.ticketEntryId) WHERE ( (OSB_TicketFlag.type_ = ?) AND (OSB_TicketFlag.flag = [$TRUE$]) )

INNER JOIN OSB_TicketWorker AS OSB_TicketWorker1 ON (OSB_TicketWorker1.ticketEntryId = OSB_TicketEntry.ticketEntryId) INNER JOIN OSB_TicketWorker AS OSB_TicketWorker2 ON (OSB_TicketWorker2.ticketEntryId = OSB_TicketEntry.ticketEntryId) INNER JOIN User_ ON (User_.userId = OSB_TicketWorker2.userId) WHERE ( (OSB_TicketWorker1.userId = ?) AND (OSB_TicketWorker1.primary_ = ? OR ? IS NULL) )
WHERE (OSB_OfferingEntry.productEntryId = ?)

INNER JOIN Subscription ON (Subscription.classNameId = [$CLASS_NAME_ID_COM.LIFERAY.OSB.MODEL.TICKETENTRY$]) AND (Subscription.classPK = OSB_TicketEntry.ticketEntryId) INNER JOIN OSB_TicketWorker ON (OSB_TicketWorker.ticketEntryId = OSB_TicketEntry.ticketEntryId) INNER JOIN User_ ON (User_.userId = OSB_TicketWorker.userId) WHERE ( (Subscription.userId = ?) AND (OSB_TicketWorker.primary_ = [$TRUE$]) )

INNER JOIN OSB_TicketWorker ON (OSB_TicketWorker.ticketEntryId = OSB_TicketEntry.ticketEntryId) INNER JOIN OSB_SupportWorker ON (OSB_SupportWorker.userId = OSB_TicketWorker.userId) WHERE (OSB_SupportWorker.supportTeamId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_TicketWorker ON (OSB_TicketWorker.ticketEntryId = OSB_TicketEntry.ticketEntryId) INNER JOIN User_ ON (User_.userId = OSB_TicketWorker.userId) WHERE (OSB_TicketWorker.userId = ?)
WHERE ( ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_TicketWorker WHERE (OSB_TicketWorker.ticketEntryId = OSB_TicketEntry.ticketEntryId) ) = ? )

SELECT DISTINCT OSB_TicketFeedback.ticketFeedbackId FROM OSB_TicketFeedback INNER JOIN OSB_TicketEntry ON (OSB_TicketEntry.closedDate IS NOT NULL) AND (OSB_TicketEntry.ticketEntryId = OSB_TicketFeedback.ticketEntryId) INNER JOIN OSB_AccountEntry ON (OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_TicketEntry.accountEntryId) [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( ( (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) OR (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.createDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.createDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.modifiedDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.modifiedDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.subject = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.satisfied = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_TicketFeedback.comments) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.status = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$RATINGS$] )
WHERE ( (OSB_TicketFeedback.createDate > ? OR ? IS NULL) AND (OSB_TicketFeedback.createDate < ? OR ? IS NULL) )
WHERE (OSB_TicketFeedback.subject = ?)

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_TicketFeedback.*} FROM OSB_TicketFeedback INNER JOIN OSB_TicketEntry ON (OSB_TicketEntry.closedDate IS NOT NULL) AND (OSB_TicketEntry.ticketEntryId = OSB_TicketFeedback.ticketEntryId) INNER JOIN OSB_AccountEntry ON (OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_TicketEntry.accountEntryId) [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( ( (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) OR (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.createDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.createDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.modifiedDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.modifiedDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.subject = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.satisfied = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_TicketFeedback.comments) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.status = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$RATINGS$] )
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountCustomer ON (OSB_AccountCustomer.accountEntryId = OSB_TicketFeedback.accountEntryId) WHERE (OSB_AccountCustomer.userId = ?)

INNER JOIN OSB_TicketWorker ON (OSB_TicketWorker.ticketEntryId = OSB_TicketFeedback.ticketEntryId) INNER JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker ON (OSB_PartnerWorker.userId = OSB_TicketWorker.userId) WHERE (OSB_PartnerWorker.partnerEntryId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker ON (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerManagedSupport = [$TRUE$]) AND (OSB_PartnerWorker.partnerEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.partnerEntryId) WHERE (OSB_PartnerWorker.userId = ?)

INNER JOIN OSB_TicketWorker ON (OSB_TicketWorker.ticketEntryId = OSB_TicketFeedback.ticketEntryId) INNER JOIN OSB_SupportWorker ON (OSB_SupportWorker.userId = OSB_TicketWorker.userId) WHERE (OSB_SupportWorker.supportTeamId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_TicketWorker ON (OSB_TicketWorker.ticketEntryId = OSB_TicketFeedback.ticketEntryId) WHERE (OSB_TicketWorker.userId = ?)

LEFT JOIN OSB_AccountCustomer ON (OSB_AccountCustomer.userId = User_.userId) LEFT JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker ON (OSB_PartnerWorker.userId = User_.userId) WHERE ( ( (OSB_AccountCustomer.accountEntryId = ?) AND (OSB_AccountCustomer.role = ?) ) OR ( (OSB_PartnerWorker.partnerEntryId = ?) AND (OSB_PartnerWorker.role = ?) ) )
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountWorker ON (OSB_AccountWorker.userId = User_.userId) WHERE (OSB_AccountWorker.role = ?)

INNER JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker AS OSB_PartnerWorker1 ON (OSB_PartnerWorker1.userId = User_.userId) INNER JOIN OSB_AccountEntry ON (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerManagedSupport = [$TRUE$]) AND (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerEntryId = OSB_PartnerWorker1.partnerEntryId) INNER JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker AS OSB_PartnerWorker2 ON (OSB_PartnerWorker2.partnerEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.partnerEntryId) WHERE (OSB_PartnerWorker2.userId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountEntry ON (OSB_AccountEntry.userId = User_.userId)
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountEntry ON (OSB_AccountEntry.modifiedUserId = User_.userId)
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountWorker ON (OSB_AccountWorker.userId = User_.userId) WHERE (OSB_AccountWorker.accountEntryId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_LicenseKey ON (OSB_LicenseKey.userId = User_.userId)
INNER JOIN OSB_LicenseKey ON (OSB_LicenseKey.modifiedUserId = User_.userId)

LEFT JOIN Users_Orgs ON (Users_Orgs.userId = User_.userId) LEFT JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker ON (OSB_PartnerWorker.userId = User_.userId) LEFT JOIN OSB_AccountEntry ON (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerEntryId = OSB_PartnerWorker.partnerEntryId) WHERE ( (Users_Orgs.organizationId = ?) OR (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerManagedSupport = [$TRUE$]) )
INNER JOIN OSB_HolidayCalendarRel ON (OSB_HolidayCalendarRel.userId = User_.userId) WHERE (OSB_HolidayCalendarRel.holidayCalendarId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_OrderEntry ON (OSB_OrderEntry.userId = User_.userId)
INNER JOIN OSB_OrderEntry ON (OSB_OrderEntry.modifiedUserId = User_.userId)
INNER JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker ON (OSB_PartnerWorker.userId = User_.userId) WHERE (OSB_PartnerWorker.partnerEntryId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_SupportWorker ON (OSB_SupportWorker.userId = User_.userId)
INNER JOIN OSB_SupportWorker ON (OSB_SupportWorker.userId = User_.userId) WHERE (OSB_SupportWorker.supportTeamId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_TicketWorker ON (OSB_TicketWorker.userId = User_.userId)
INNER JOIN OSB_TicketWorker ON (OSB_TicketWorker.userId = User_.userId) WHERE (OSB_TicketWorker.ticketEntryId = ?)
